variable_declarations.pattern:
Dim strName As String
Dim intAge As Integer
Dim dblSalary As Double
Dim blnActive As Boolean
Dim varData As Variant
variable_declarations.description: Basic variable declarations with VB6 to C# type mappings

function_declaration.pattern:
Public Function CalculateTotal(ByVal price As Double, ByVal quantity As Integer) As Double
    CalculateTotal = price * quantity
End Function
function_declaration.description: Function declaration with parameters and return value

subroutine_declaration.pattern:
Public Sub DisplayMessage(ByVal message As String)
    MsgBox message
End Sub
subroutine_declaration.description: Subroutine declaration with void return type

if_then_else.pattern:
If age >= 18 Then
    status = "Adult"
ElseIf age >= 13 Then
    status = "Teen"
Else
    status = "Child"
End If

select_case.pattern:
Select Case dayOfWeek
    Case 1
        dayName = "Monday"
    Case 2
        dayName = "Tuesday"
    Case 3 To 5
        dayName = "Midweek"
    Case Else
        dayName = "Weekend"
End Select
select_case.description: Select Case statement converted to switch-case

for_loop.pattern:
For i = 1 To 10
    total = total + i
Next i

For i = 10 To 1 Step -1
    Debug.Print i
Next

for_each_loop.pattern:
Dim item As Variant
For Each item In collection
    Debug.Print item
Next item
for_each_loop.description: For Each loop iteration over collections

while_loop.pattern:
While condition = True
    ' Do something
    counter = counter + 1
    If counter > 100 Then Exit While
Wend

do_loop.pattern:
Do While counter < 10
    counter = counter + 1
Loop

Do
    counter = counter + 1
Loop Until counter >= 10

error_handling.pattern:
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
' Some code that might fail
result = 10 / value
Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "Error: " & Err.Description
    Resume Next
error_handling.description: Error handling with On Error GoTo converted to try-catch

error_raising.pattern:
If value < 0 Then
    Err.Raise 1001, "MyFunction", "Value cannot be negative"
End If
error_raising.description: Error raising with Err.Raise converted to throw exception

string_operations.pattern:
fullName = firstName & " " & lastName
length = Len(fullName)
upperName = UCase(fullName)
lowerName = LCase(fullName)
trimmed = Trim(fullName)

string_functions.pattern:
leftPart = Left(text, 5)
rightPart = Right(text, 3)
middlePart = Mid(text, 2, 4)
position = InStr(text, "search")
string_functions.description: VB6 string functions converted to C# methods

numeric_functions.pattern:
result = Int(3.7)
result = Fix(3.7)
result = Round(3.7, 2)
result = Abs(-5)
result = Sqr(16)

date_time_operations.pattern:
currentDate = Now
currentTime = Time
justDate = Date
formattedDate = Format(Now, "mm/dd/yyyy")
yearPart = Year(Now)

type_conversion.pattern:
strValue = CStr(123)
intValue = CInt("456")
dblValue = CDbl("78.9")
blnValue = CBool(1)

array_operations.pattern:
Dim arr(1 To 10) As Integer
Dim dynArr() As String
ReDim dynArr(5)
ReDim Preserve dynArr(10)
ubound = UBound(arr)
lbound = LBound(arr)

collection_operations.pattern:
Dim col As New Collection
col.Add "Item1", "Key1"
col.Add "Item2"
item = col.Item("Key1")
col.Remove "Key1"
count = col.Count
collection_operations.description: VB6 Collection converted to Dictionary or List

object_creation.pattern:
Dim obj As Object
Set obj = CreateObject("Excel.Application")
Set obj = New MyClass
Set obj = Nothing

with_statement.pattern:
With objPerson
    .Name = "John"
    .Age = 30
    .Address = "123 Main St"
End With
with_statement.description: With statement for object property assignment

property_procedures.pattern:
Private m_Name As String

Public Property Get Name() As String
    Name = m_Name
End Property

Public Property Let Name(ByVal value As String)
    m_Name = value
End Property
property_procedures.description: VB6 Property Get/Let converted to C# properties

class_initialization.pattern:
Private Sub Class_Initialize()
    ' Constructor code
    m_Value = 0
End Sub

Private Sub Class_Terminate()
    ' Destructor code
    Set m_Object = Nothing
End Sub

optional_parameters.pattern:
Public Function Calculate(ByVal x As Double, Optional ByVal y As Double = 1) As Double
    Calculate = x * y
End Function

byref_parameters.pattern:
Public Sub Swap(ByRef a As Integer, ByRef b As Integer)
    Dim temp As Integer
    temp = a
    a = b
    b = temp
End Sub
byref_parameters.description: ByRef parameters converted to ref parameters

debug_print.pattern:
Debug.Print "Value is: " & value
Debug.Print "Starting process..."
Debug.Assert condition

file_operations.pattern:
Open "data.txt" For Input As #1
Line Input #1, textLine
Close #1

Open "output.txt" For Output As #2
Print #2, "Hello World"
Close #2
